title: Lane classifier: decide a backlog row's lane, or refuse it
action: This is the mechanism D6 has been asserting without owning, and approach.md names it the HIGH risk that must be proved before the loop ever runs unattended. Given a PBI id, read its docs/backlog.md row and emit JSON {pbi, lane, hard_gate_flags[], dispatchable, reason}. Count the mode-gate risk flags from the row text using bee-planning's own list, and treat the hard-gate flags (auth, authorization, data loss, audit/security, external provider, validation removal) as decisive. Refuse - dispatchable false - when the lane is high-risk, when any hard-gate flag matches, AND whenever the row cannot be classified with confidence: no row found, empty text, or a signal count the rules do not cover. Fail closed is the whole point; an unclassifiable row must never come back dispatchable. The reason string must name the specific flag or the specific reason confidence failed, never a bare 'high-risk'. Directory name is herdr-orchestrating (D21). Write byte-identical copies into both skill roots.

truths: A row mentioning auth or data loss returns dispatchable false and names the flag
A PBI id with no row in docs/backlog.md returns dispatchable false, not an error and not true
A row with empty or unparseable text returns dispatchable false
An ordinary low-risk row returns dispatchable true with its lane
The reason always names a specific cause
prohibitions: Do not return dispatchable true for anything the rules cannot classify
Do not read or modify docs/backlog.md other than reading rows
Do not name any directory bee-*

verify: set -e; C=.claude/skills/herdr-orchestrating/scripts/classify-lane.mjs; J() { node "$C" "$1" | node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on('data',d=>s+=d).on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(s);console.log(j.dispatchable+'|'+(j.reason||''))})"; }; test "$(J PBI-044 | cut -d'|' -f1)" = false; test -n "$(J PBI-044 | cut -d'|' -f2)"; test "$(J PBI-999 | cut -d'|' -f1)" = false; test "$(J PBI-038 | cut -d'|' -f1)" = true; diff -q "$C" .agents/skills/herdr-orchestrating/scripts/classify-lane.mjs; echo CLASSIFIER_FAILS_CLOSED
